review_title: A simple CRM that allowed us to hit the ground running
description: Overall I have been pleasantly surprised. I at first thought the system would be too underpowered for what we needed, but it has actually delivered on what we have needed and the simplicity of changing things has allowed us to easily experiment with our processes until we have things right. It has suited our small team very well - and I look forward to seeing how well it scales with us.
author: Robert J.
pros: I like the simplicity of the system. It was very quick and easy both to setup (and make changes to) and then to use the system. It has been very easy to train new employees on. The system has some good power around workflows - which have helped us lock down our processes and helped new staff to follow them. It has a good integration with Xero which has saved us a lot of time and has just released an integration into a mail campaign tool (Transpond) which looks to be a nice added bonus.
cons: The system doesn't have a document generation tool (so you need to generate invoices and quotes in a separate system). It also is comparatively underpowered in the reports you can generate (even when you upgrade to the higher tiers that have additional reporting functionality). You can export full data sets to CSV - so we have built what we needed in Excel, but it would be nice to have it saved as reports and visualisations in the system. There also isn't the flexibility around notifications that I am previously used to (and so we have had to adjust the workflows a little).

review_title: My first choice for email marketing.
description: The product has allowed us to efficiently create professional looking camping and provide reliable insights that enhance our decision making.
author: Lombardiga B.
pros: Capsule software allows to efficiently send email campings and track all campaign performance in real-time. Customizability of the software is very high.
cons: Capsule software excels in most areas I have nothing to dislike.

review_title: Could be great but it has a fatal flaw.
description: I am hoping that they will fix the above deficiency quickly or we have to change to a different app.
author: Michael L.
pros: Simplicity. Price. It appeared to be the right product for the right price.
cons: They don’t understand the mission critical relationship between logging an activity and a related task generation. It has to be done entirely manually with no auto reminders or follow-ups. It seemed like such a basic requirement that I didn’t even check for it. My bad.

review_title: wonderful Software for every business
description: The software is simple to use, it has a wide range of tools that you can use. However, the great thing you dont have to use all the features and they are hidden away, so they dont affect your everyday usage. Incredibly for this type of software and all the tools you can access, it is incredibly affordable for personal, small business or large companies. We really love the product
author: Peter R.
pros: We have used this software for over five years. We used to use act and were reluctant to move to another provider. We moved because we could use the software on all forms of devices, anywhere in the world. The other great feature is that it is so simple to use, you hardly need any training at all
cons: Actually we love it, so we dont really have anything negative to say

review_title: Capsule Review
author: REBECCA H.
pros: Very easy to set up Easy and intuitive to use It is flexible enough so that it can be moulded around a requirement or purpose, even if that function isn't immediately obvious. The support staff are great at coming up with solutions and work arounds Support staff are very quick to respond. The close links with Mailchimp and Zapier are great and really easy to merge different systems.
cons: You can't 'drag and drop' documents from the system to emails. There's no 'pre-opportunity' stage - i.e. no way of registering an interest in a product (linking a client and product or organisation) without it being a formal 'opportunity' - there needs to be a 'pre-opportunity' facility to ease admin in the system. There's no way of retaining a record of a meeting in the calendar. There's no one to stand behind my husband and remind him to record notes in the system! :-)

review_title: Simple and Functional
description: My needs for tracking client opportunities are simple and this CRM does everything I need of it. I mainly use it for recording my meetings and coaching sessions with my clients. This functionality is easy to use and it is easy to search clients later to see what was last talked about.
author: Dave S.
pros: It is incredibly easy to set up, very simple to use and I like it's integration with Xero.
cons: Sending email from the system get stored in dropbox, not ideal if you don't use dropbox

review_title: Best CRM I've ever used
description: Peace of mind for my business
author: Peter M.
pros: Visual presentation of the data, ease of access, monthly subscription, data capture, project tracking, email link capability, mobile access.
cons: The CRM had no functions that I disliked

review_title: Essential tool for the small business owner
description: I use this to manage our entire sales process and delivery of all client projects as well. Our team loves it, it's simple to use and nicely designed.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Keeping track of sales and leads with automated tasks and follow up emails. Revenue forecasting. Detailed metrics for analyzing your sales process. Email templates. User permissions. The calendar view so you can see all team tasks alongside calendar events and deadlines.
cons: I had to really think to come up with something!

review_title: Review of Capsule
description: Very good and very easy to use. Just for us we needed it to be more specific to our industry.
author: Gavin M.
pros: Very fast and clean system to work from. Great on mobile devices.
cons: I think there could be a bit more development on creating bespoke fields more.

review_title: Easy to use and easy to customise
description: Very good, easy to use, easy to set up, does almost everything we need.
author: Rebecca S.
pros: It makes it really easy to store emails between teams to pick up work while members are away. Pipeline sales tracking is really useful to keep track of sales prospectives, and we created a pipeline specifically for renewals as well to get a good overall picture of both. Custom tags can be added as well so we can personalise it to our product types.
cons: The tags make it useful to track specific details about products, but it doesn't seem possible to use these tags when looking at sales forecasting, and splitting revenue by custom tags. This would be a great feature to make the forecasting more interactive and drill down into more detail.

review_title: A Good Starter CRM
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Capsule has a simple and intuitive Dashboard that makes it easy to navigate, create new leads and handle the projects and clients through different pipelines.
cons: In my opinion, capsule lacks essential functionalities like a proper help of AI or deep automations to be considered by many more companies.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Use it daily and recommend it to all my clients
description: I recommend Capsule to clients for simple efficiency. Just getting your tasks sorted according to client or project is a huge benefit and Capsule, to me, is much more intuitive than something like Asana
author: Linda C.
pros: For me, task and workflow management make life much easier. No more remembering important calls or actions; they just come up in your dashboard. This is especially relevant when you're toggling several clients at the same time.
cons: The pipeline forecast graph (revenue forecasted per month) never seems to be correct and I've not been able to figure out how to fix it. This area could be more foolproof. Also, I never look at the latest updates on the 'home' screen even though it takes up most of the space. Imo, this could be replaced with relevant data like the pipeline graph. Better yet, make this a customisable widget area so people can choose what would work best for them.

review_title: Finaly a solution for my needs!
description: For last few years I had a problem with my comunication with old and new clients. Too many pressure and too much information noise casued a problem of following up possible new clients and opportunities. My first solution was standard PIM software. Soon I discovered that only part of my problems were solved. Problems that become so evident were following up new opportunities and contacts history. I found some other partial solutions for these problems but was necessary to work, mantain and balance with diferent solutions, multiple insertions of same data and so on. Looking for better solution I got to start with some offline CRM solutions, and I tested several ones. Every program had some part that were interesting to me but neither had all of options that I was looking for. Some prgrams were fantastic but expensive or they needed dedicatd servers. Most of them had so many options that I don't need for my work and can be applied in some other sectors. Finally, on one webpage that was doing reviews of buisiness software there was a list of several on-line CRM solutions and so I decided to try some of them. As 3rd, or 4th, started with CAPSULE CRM. Everything that I needed was there: database of contacts, history (well done), opportunities,...Also flexibility for procedures and all sorf of extra activities was there. PERFECT. Mobile apps is must have when You are out of the office. Today on my computers 2 web pages are always ON during work time: webmail and CAPSULE.
author: Edo M.
pros: Free version is mostly perfect for my needs. Contacts database, contacts history, opportunities creating and following, procedure design and editor, flexibility.
cons: Free version have a limit to 250 contacts.

review_title: Best in Class CRM
description: I originally acquired Capsule to keep track of customers, potential customers, task management, and event management for a coaching and education business. I continue to track coaching clients in the software, but now I primarily use it for event and task management for a grassroots nonprofit.
author: Beth L.
pros: Capsule is a CRM system that delivers excellent support for a small cost. It is more customizable and has more features and greater ease of use than others in its price range. It was fairly easy to set up, customize, and learn using the provided guides and the responsive customer service team. It easily supports tracking of all actions related to an entity in one place. It has a number of built-in APIs for integration with email marketing tools and other applications. I really appreciate the task tracking, the ability to track potential customers through a customizable sales funnel, and the capacity for creating cases for tracking interactions with related to a particular person, organization, or project. I also like the ease with which I can create my own "tracks" for processes that I often repeat.
cons: The things I would want in a CRM application that are not present in Capsule are all things for which I would expect to spend more money. For example, if I were to spend more money on a CRM, I would look for one that includes volunteer sign up forms and the ability for donors to manage their own profiles and track their own donations. It is a pretty simple tool, but again, very robust for the price.

review_title: Capsule has streamlined our business opportunity process
description: We use it daily, and we are working fine with Capsule.
author: Ricardo A.
pros: The product is very easy tu use, contacts, organizations, oportunities and case management is intuitive and effective.
cons: 1. I would like the contacts capture be automated with some data from the contact´s organization. It is not easy to repeat the capture of the address, phone information on each contac, considering that it could be extracted from the contact´s organization. 2. I would like to have an spanish version.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Super helpful!
author: Rebecca H.
pros: The UI/UX is exactly what we needed! This software brings together our sales and marketing department and shows transparently and where we are in the business - [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN]
cons: There is nothing that we wish we had or could improve on :-)

review_title: This is IT
description: I use it and recommend it to my clients.
author: Philip M.
pros: If you don't want to hire an assistant but need something to keep you on track then you have come to the right place
cons: I would like it to work better with Apple.

review_title: Been using Capsule for over two years, and it's easy to track leads, clients and tasks per project.
description: Cost efficient way to keep daily tasks organized.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The best thing about Capsule is how helpful it is with keeping me organized. We have over 100 clients that I need to keep track of. With each client at a different phase, it could become overwhelming to keep track of all of the details. Capsule helps me stay on top of everything
cons: Tracking emails is a little cumbersome. I BCC a capsule email address associated with a project. When a client replies to that email the BCC is not copied, so that email does not get tracked. I could copy the email address, but that is not something I want the client to see,
author_profession: Event Design By Terrain: Operations Manager

review_title: Lacked Calendar tool needed for us to be effective
description: It was an adequate tool but didn't fulfill enough of our needs for us to continue using the software.
author: April H.
pros: I found the software easy to use and fairly intuitive for the everyday user. It managed leads adequately and allowed me to find my information easily.
cons: We needed a tool that would allow us to easily track booked events on a calendar and see trends of inquiries for specific dates. Capsule lacked an effective calendar tool to help us manage leads by date which made it ineffectual for us.

review_title: The views of a small business technophob
description: It is our company database so we use it many times a day. The experience has been good but I'd say that the fact it is reassuring basic will in the long term be an issue.
author: Lizzie H.
pros: Capsule is very easy to use and for someone who hates complex tech it is reassuring straightforward
cons: We haven't integrated the software with our other systems so we are probably missing a trick. What I like least is the fact that I do have to somethings twice. I probably need some coaching!

review_title: OK CRM for the Price
description: I have to have a CRM in place for my company to keep clients tasks organized. We manage hundreds of clients daily.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Capsule has basic functionality. I have a list of my Contacts, I can create tasks, make tags, and create pipelines. It allows me to upload documents and manage the team's tasks under me.
cons: I can only upload one document at a time which is annoying. The automatic email BCC doesn't work for me to record in my notes so I always have to copy and paste.

review_title: Efficiency of the CRM
description: Very beneficial for leads and following them up.
author: Melanie A.
pros: Ease of use and efficiency. Mainly use for sales enquiry follow ups.
cons: Not being able to delete a contact once they had left the company

review_title: Capsule is the most efficient CRM available
description: I use 17+ systems (one for each client) and it makes it so easy to track progress
author: Christopher R.
pros: Ease of use in tracking conversations, email and contacts
cons: There are no cons to this software that I have identified

review_title: Why I Acquired Capsule
description: My management of clients has improved dramatically.
author: Graham M.
pros: CAPSULE is extremely easy to use and is built for users, not programmers. Developing one's knowledge and understanding developes in easy steps and is well supported by superb documentation
cons: I have not come across any to date, including webcam training , on line documentation

review_title: An Honest and Basic CRM for sme
description: Capsule is an easy to use CRM with all the "basic" necessary features to manage your customers / prospects and their history It is the centralized place where you can store all your customers / prospects contacts and manage them. You need other specialized tools if you want to manage completely the pipeline, the sales cycle, the service tickets There some good integrations but limited. All the rest should be managed via API
author: Mauro P.
pros: Easy to use Nice integration with Socials to retrive people information (pictures) Some basic easy to use integration with msot popular tools like Mailchimp, Xero, Zendesk Good the App for iOS
cons: Limited tools integration No a really solution to manage sales cycles and tickects
